standard.hold_line: Hold your line, car on {side}|Hold your line, car by {side}
standard.still_there: Car still on {side}|Car still there on {side}|Still got a car on {side}
standard.closing_fast: Car closing fast on {side}|Car coming quickly on {side}
standard.clear_all_round: Clear all around|All clear|No cars nearby
standard.in_the_middle: Three wide|Car in the middle|Three cars abreast
standard.disengage_limiter: Disengage pit limiter|Lift the limiter, clear of pits
standard.fuel_critical: Fuel critical, less than one lap|Fuel for less than one lap, pit now

aggressive.hold_line: Hold your line! Car on {side}|Do not move! Car by {side}
aggressive.closing_fast: Closing very fast on {side}!|Car right there on {side}!
aggressive.engage_limiter: Limiter! Engage it now!|Pit limiter now!
aggressive.fuel_critical: Fuel critical! Pit now|You are out of fuel, pit now!

formal.hold_line: Hold your trajectory, vehicle on {side}|Maintain your line, car on {side}
formal.still_there: Vehicle still on {side}|Car still present on {side}
formal.clear_left: Clear on the left|Left side clear
formal.clear_right: Clear on the right|Right side clear
formal.clear_all_round: Clear on both sides|No traffic nearby
formal.in_the_middle: Three cars abreast|Vehicle in the middle
formal.fuel_critical: Fuel critical, less than one lap|Range below one lap, pit now
